word: H7096 - קָצָה - qâtsâh - kaw-tsaw' - Cut off

sections.paragraph:
Original: קצה

Transliteration: qâtsâh

Phonetic: kaw-tsaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut off
    1. (Qal) to cut off
    2. (Piel) to cut off
    3. (Hiphil) to scrape, scrape off

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2053

Part(s) of speech: Verb
